mapper.select: /* 공지사항 일반 목록 조회 notice.selectNoticeListNormal */ SELECT NOTICE_ID , NOTICE_TYPE_CD , TITLE , PIN_YN , PIN_DT , VIEW_CNT , FEATURED_YN , USE_YN , CRTR_ID , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE 1 = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PIN_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC

/* 공지사항 고정 목록 조회 notice.selectNoticeListPinned */ SELECT NOTICE_ID , NOTICE_TYPE_CD , TITLE , PIN_YN , PIN_DT , VIEW_CNT , FEATURED_YN , USE_YN , CRTR_ID , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE 1 = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PIN_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY IFNULL(PIN_DT, CREATE_DT) DESC, CREATE_DT DESC

/* 공지사항 상세 조회 notice.selectNoticeDetail */ SELECT NOTICE_ID , NOTICE_TYPE_CD , TITLE , CONTENT , PIN_YN , PIN_DT , VIEW_CNT , USE_YN , CRTR_ID , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT , FEATURED_YN FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: /* 공지사항 등록 notice.insertNotice */ INSERT INTO TB_NOTICE ( NOTICE_ID , NOTICE_TYPE_CD , TITLE , CONTENT , PIN_YN , PIN_DT , VIEW_CNT , FEATURED_YN , USE_YN , CRTR_ID , CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{noticeId} , #{noticeTypeCd} , #{title} , #{content} , IFNULL(#{pinYn}, 'N') , CASE WHEN IFNULL(#{pinYn}, 'N') = 'Y' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END , IFNULL(#{viewCnt}, 0) , IFNULL(#{featuredYn}, 'N') , IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y') , #{crtrId} , NOW() )
